scenario.title: The Approval Workflow
scenario.context: You're designing a document approval workflow that involves multiple AI analysis steps, human approval gates, and the ability to loop back for revisions. The workflow must track state and handle complex transitions.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that defines a state machine workflow with loops, human-in-the-loop gates, and comprehensive state tracking.
constraints: Define explicit states and valid transitions
Include at least one human approval gate
Track audit trail of all state changes
scenario.exampleInput: Document approval: Draft → AI Review → Manager Approval → (if rejected: back to author for revision) → Legal Review → Published. Need full audit trail and max 3 revision cycles.
hints: Define states as a finite set
Include data captured at each transition

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear gates with escalation and timeout
Full audit log schema with all fields

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Design a document approval state machine workflow:

WORKFLOW: Document Approval Pipeline
Type: State Machine with Human Gates

---

STATES:
```
DRAFT          - Initial state, document being created
AI_REVIEW      - Automated quality/compliance check
PENDING_MANAGER - Awaiting manager approval
REVISION       - Sent back to author for changes
PENDING_LEGAL  - Awaiting legal review
APPROVED       - All approvals complete
PUBLISHED      - Final state, document live
REJECTED       - Terminal state, permanently declined
```

---

VALID TRANSITIONS:
```
DRAFT → AI_REVIEW
  Trigger: Author submits
  Condition: Document not empty

AI_REVIEW → PENDING_MANAGER
  Trigger: AI check passes
  Condition: ai_score >= 70

AI_REVIEW → REVISION
  Trigger: AI check fails
  Condition: ai_score < 70

PENDING_MANAGER → PENDING_LEGAL
  Trigger: Manager approves
  Condition: Human action

PENDING_MANAGER → REVISION
  Trigger: Manager requests changes
  Condition: Human action

PENDING_MANAGER → REJECTED
  Trigger: Manager rejects permanently
  Condition: Human action + reason required

REVISION → AI_REVIEW
  Trigger: Author resubmits
  Condition: revision_count < 3

REVISION → REJECTED
  Trigger: Max revisions exceeded
  Condition: revision_count >= 3

PENDING_LEGAL → APPROVED
  Trigger: Legal approves
  Condition: Human action

PENDING_LEGAL → REVISION
  Trigger: Legal requests changes
  Condition: Human action

APPROVED → PUBLISHED
  Trigger: Scheduled publish time OR manual publish
  Condition: All approvals valid
```

---

HUMAN APPROVAL GATES:

Gate 1: Manager Approval
```json
{
  "gate_id": "manager_approval",
  "state": "PENDING_MANAGER",
  "assignee_role": "manager",
  "timeout": "48h",
  "timeout_action": "escalate_to_director",
  "required_fields": ["decision", "comments"],
  "decisions": ["approve", "request_changes", "reject"]
}
```

Gate 2: Legal Review
```json
{
  "gate_id": "legal_review",
  "state": "PENDING_LEGAL",
  "assignee_role": "legal_team",
  "timeout": "72h",
  "timeout_action": "notify_compliance",
  "required_fields": ["decision", "legal_notes"],
  "decisions": ["approve", "request_changes"]
}
```

---

LOOP CONTROL:
```json
{
  "max_revision_cycles": 3,
  "current_revision": 0,
  "on_max_exceeded": "auto_reject",
  "revision_history": [
    {
      "cycle": 1,
      "returned_from": "PENDING_MANAGER",
      "reason": "Needs more data",
      "returned_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

AUDIT TRAIL SCHEMA:
```json
{
  "document_id": "doc-123",
  "audit_log": [
    {
      "event_id": "evt-001",
      "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
      "from_state": "DRAFT",
      "to_state": "AI_REVIEW",
      "trigger": "author_submit",
      "actor": {
        "type": "user",
        "id": "user-456",
        "name": "John Smith"
      },
      "metadata": {
        "document_version": 1,
        "comments": "Initial submission"
      }
    },
    {
      "event_id": "evt-002",
      "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:30:05Z",
      "from_state": "AI_REVIEW",
      "to_state": "PENDING_MANAGER",
      "trigger": "ai_check_pass",
      "actor": {
        "type": "system",
        "id": "ai-reviewer"
      },
      "metadata": {
        "ai_score": 85,
        "checks_passed": ["grammar", "compliance", "format"]
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

---

WORKFLOW METADATA:
```json
{
  "workflow_id": "wf-approval-v1",
  "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z",
  "current_state": "PENDING_MANAGER",
  "revision_count": 0,
  "total_duration_hours": 0.5,
  "sla_deadline": "2024-01-18T10:00:00Z"
}
```
